notes: New Console look — the app now matches the website: terminal surfaces, green accent, monospaced numerals, new icon.
Limit alerts: get notified at 80% and 95% of any Claude limit (Session / Weekly / Fable).
Notch fixes: the menu-bar item rescues itself from under the notch, and the widget + Dashboard stay reachable even when the bar is full.
Right-click menus on the menu-bar item and the desktop widget.
Report a bug / suggest a feature straight from the Dashboard.
